title: ctenium cirrosum
intro: Ctenium cirrosum is a perennial grass native to tropical Africa and Asia, often found in sandy or rocky areas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ctenium cirrosum include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in digestion and relieving respiratory issues. Ctenium cirrosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been studied for potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
